nl_query: For each faculty member, show their name, department, total scripts assigned as primary evaluator, total scripts submitted, total honorarium approved, and the average marks they awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, au.academic_unit_name, COUNT(sa.id) AS total_scripts_primary_evaluator, COUNT(ea.id) AS total_scripts_submitted, SUM(hs.final_amount) AS total_honorarium_approved, AVG(em.marks_awarded) AS average_marks_per_script
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   app_user au ON au.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id
JOIN   honorarium_summary hs ON hs.faculty_cache_id = fc.id
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id
WHERE  ea.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY'
GROUP  BY fc.name, au.academic_unit_name
ORDER  BY total_scripts_primary_evaluator DESC, total_scripts_submitted DESC, total_honorarium_approved DESC, average_marks_per_script DESC
error: Validation failed (semantic): SQL joins multiple child fact tables (e.g., marks, assignments, honorarium) in the same flat query block. This causes a Cartesian product and inflates aggregate counts. You MUST pre-aggregate child tables in separate CTEs before joining them to the parent entity.
